name: Cole Sprouse
description: An American actor who rose to fame as a child star on Disney Channel and later starred as Jughead Jones in Riverdale.

name: Timothée Chalamet
description: An acclaimed actor known for his emotionally nuanced roles in films like Call Me by Your Name and Dune.

name: Tom Holland
description: An English actor best known for playing Spider-Man in the Marvel Cinematic Universe, recognized for his energetic performances and acrobatic style.

name: Ezra Miller
description: An American actor known for playing The Flash in DC films and for roles in Fantastic Beasts and independent cinema.

name: Clémence Poésy
description: A French actress and model known internationally for playing Fleur Delacour in the Harry Potter films and for roles in European and Hollywood productions.

name: Cooper Koch
description: An American actor known for appearing in television dramas and films, gaining attention for his intense and character-driven performances.
